projectDescription: A Chrome extension that turns LinkedIn profiles and company pages into actionable AI-powered intelligence, with warm path discovery and strategic engagement planning.
keyFeatures: AI-powered LinkedIn profile analysis tailored to specific goals (sales, hiring, fundraising, partnerships)
Intel Map for company-level strategic engagement planning
Warm path discovery — surfaces introduction routes through your analyzed network
Multi-provider LLM support: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Gemini
Deep profile scraping: work history, education, skills, recommendations, recent posts, and mutual connections
Auto-save and exportable reports in Markdown format
Background service worker pipeline — analysis continues even when side panel is closed
Company enrichment — automatically scrapes employer pages for richer context
publicApiSurface: chrome.runtime message: startAnalysis — triggers profile analysis pipeline
chrome.runtime message: getJobStatus — polls current analysis job state
chrome.runtime message: clearJob — resets analysis job to idle
chrome.runtime message: startIntelMap — triggers company intel map pipeline
chrome.runtime message: getIntelJobStatus — polls intel map job state
chrome.runtime message: clearIntelJob — resets intel map job to idle
content/scrape.js — extracts profile data (name, headline, experience, education, skills, about, recommendations)
content/scrape-company.js — company about page scraper (name, industry, size, HQ, description)
chrome.storage.sync: provider, model, apiKeys — AI provider configuration
chrome.storage.local: savedReports — persisted analysis and intel map reports
